commit_note: This review is committed with the setup change and cannot self-reference its final commit SHA.

findings: Missing risk_agent gate in the autonomous runner.
Approval queue conflicted with mandatory git push.
The broker-write allowed scanner exception was value-blind.
fixes_applied: Added risk_agent trade-ticket gate to runner, templates, prompts, and roadmap.
Added safe git push exception after public repo hygiene, secret, forbidden-surface, and relevant safety checks pass.
Reworked forbidden-surface scanner and added true-value regression coverage.

findings: Final-review-only governance needed migration language in branch policy.
Trade-ticket risk review, benchmark comparison, and ETF allowlist imports were too implicit.
Final package evidence wording needed to avoid formal investment-proof framing.
fixes_applied: Added Program Runner final-only review policy to branching policy.
Added benchmark, risk_agent, and ETF allowlist obligations.
Clarified final evidence as research/backtest/scenario evidence, not formal investment proof.

findings: No branch guard before automated commit/push.
Runner state update ordering was not auditable.
Approval queue lacked stable item fields.
fixes_applied: Added branch guard and Stage 3.1 prerequisite verification.
Added resume instructions for intermediate states.
Moved runner state update before final commit and push.

findings: Roadmap test was mostly string-fragment based.
Scanner exception lacked red regression coverage.
fixes_applied: Added structural roadmap block parsing in tests.

findings: The broker-write allowed scanner exception could mask future unsafe true value.
fixes_applied: Added value-aware scanner masking and true-value regression coverage.

findings: All reviewer findings were addressed in repo-only files.
fixes_applied: Added branch and Stage 3.1 prerequisite guards.
Added risk_agent, benchmark, and ETF allowlist obligations.
Added Program Runner governance safety tests.
